pipeline_status.poller: Quiet — 6 consecutive quiet polls. Dome site stable at V51.0. No manual commits detected.
pipeline_status.analyst: No pending changes. Threat level: NONE.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 67/67 WINs reviewed (Cycle 1 complete). 5 sections reviewed (SEC-3.1 through SEC-3.5.2). 17 sections, 9 holistic checks, and prose items still pending. Digest shows 0 unprocessed reviews, but 15 under-covered WINs with 36 missing issue entries.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. All 7 pages checked. Automation running normally (monitor.py ~2h, pull_data.py ~6h). Internal inconsistencies unchanged: WIN count 67 vs 62, eclipse nT -17/-21 vs -29.1, AI context V50.10 vs V51.0.

integrity_status.overall: warn (but both 'major' issues are FALSE POSITIVES)
integrity_status.details: Integrity report from 2026-04-06 flagged showTab('details') (3 occurrences) and href='#part4c' as broken. Verified: showTab('details') does NOT appear anywhere in published HTML (grep returns 0 matches). id='part4c' EXISTS at line 1651 of docs/index.html. Both are false positives from the integrity checker. Opened ISS-283 as infrastructure issue.
integrity_status.real_issues: 5 broken external links (CHAMP 404, GRACE 404, LPI Apollo 404, CUORE expired SSL, CHIME DNS failure) — all institutional restructuring, not content removal.

internal_issues.description: FABRICATED DOI: 10.1038/ngeo2516 resolves to Doetterl et al. (2015) 'Soil carbon storage' — wrong paper entirely. Correct: Stephens & L'Ecuyer (2015), Atmospheric Research, DOI 10.1016/j.atmosres.2015.06.024. Additionally, scientific framing is wrong: Stephens found hemispheric SYMMETRY; +0.34 W/m² is an emerging trend, not a static difference.
internal_issues.suggested_patch: See suggested-patches-2026-04-06T14-12.json — 3 patches for detail_evidence, detail_verdict_text, and finding

internal_issues.description: WIN-054 evidence falsely claims ΛCDM accommodates El Gordo. Research shows El Gordo is in 6.2σ tension with ΛCDM (Asencio et al. 2023, ApJ 954, 162). Kim et al. DOI unverified. Evidence must be rewritten to acknowledge genuine tension while maintaining dome has no alternative.
internal_issues.suggested_patch: See suggested-patches — 3 patches for detail_evidence, detail_verdict_text, and finding

internal_issues.description: WIN-054 verdict 'Misleading' retained. Dome exploits genuine ΛCDM tension without providing alternative. Verdict is correct: cherry-picking a real problem without offering a solution IS misleading. But evidence now acknowledges the 6.2σ tension.

WIN-058 claim is undefined on dome site — no equations, measurements, or physical consequences. Our review argues against our own interpretation. DEFERRED: Needs curmudgeon section review (SEC-4.5.9 pending) to determine if the argument can be strengthened or WIN-058 should be flagged as untestable.

WIN-065 measurement methodology undefined. DEFERRED: Needs verification of what instrument/conditions the dome claims. Current argument holds (refraction formula inconsistency) but could be strengthened.
WIN-065 refraction formula n(r) gives ~0.04° at Oslo, not +4.5° claimed. DEFERRED: Same as ISS-275, needs coordinated fix.

Integrity checker producing false positives: flagged showTab('details') and #part4c as broken, but showTab('details') doesn't appear in published HTML and #part4c exists at line 1651. The integrity prompt or check logic needs updating to avoid false alarms.

under_covered_status: Digest found 15 under-covered WINs with 36 missing issue entries. Verified several (WIN-011 geographic error, WIN-033 distance error) were already fixed in previous sessions. Created new issues for genuinely unfixed holes: WIN-066 DOI (ISS-279), WIN-014 framing (ISS-281), WIN-033 unsupported assertion (ISS-282). Remaining under-covered holes are mostly minor and already partially addressed.

recommended_actions.action: IMMEDIATE: Apply WIN-066 patches — fabricated DOI is our single most embarrassing error. A dome defender checking this citation would find a soil carbon paper.
IMMEDIATE: Apply WIN-054 patches — evidence currently claims ΛCDM accommodates El Gordo, which is wrong (6.2σ tension). Rewrite acknowledges genuine tension while maintaining dome has no alternative.
Run code_analysis tag sync: node build-scripts/sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace . — curmudgeon has validated tags for all 67 WINs but wins.json shows 0/67 synced.
Fix integrity checker false positives: update monitor/prompts/structure-integrity.md to grep published HTML for actual occurrences rather than pattern-matching source templates.
Replace 5 broken external links (CHAMP, GRACE, Apollo LRR, CUORE, CHIME) with current URLs or archive.org fallbacks.
